name: Three Beans in a Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/5 cup Pinto beans, cooked and drained
3/5 cup Garbanzo beans; cooked and drained
1 1/2 cups Green beans; sliced and steamed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a salad bowl combine all ingredients except lettuce.
2. Chill the mixture.
3. Serve on lettuce leaves.
